data.title: Riot Platforms stock climbs after Starboard Value letter urges more deals
data.description:
Riot Platforms (RIOT) stock gained 4.5% in Wednesday premarket trading after hedge fund and investor Starboard Value urged the bitcoin mining and infrastructure company to complete deals while demand for its sites is strong and to further improve its corporate governance and operations.

If the company doesn't act quickly, the company may become an attractive takeover target, Starboard Value warned.

The company has the opportunity to "execute on sizable and value-creating AI/HPC deals in the near future," Peter A. Feld, Starboard Value's managing member, wrote in a letter to Riot's (RIOT) CEO and chairman.

With power being the limiting factor in AI data center development, Riot's (RIOT) ready-powered sites are "more valuable," he said. AI/high-performance compute companies are turning to crypto mining companies as sources of near-term power capacity. Riot's recently announced transaction with Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is a “positive signal” but it's a "small proof of concept deal, and we, like you, expect significantly more."

"We believe that Riot is better positioned to do higher-quality deals than its peers," Feld added. "Time is of the essence, and a renewed sense of urgency is required to get more material deals completed."

Additionally, the company needs to complete governance and operational transformation.

Starboard warns that if Riot Platforms doesn't move fast enough to sign on AI companies, it may become a takeover target.

"With the company already more than a year into its journey and peers executing in a dynamic and opportunistic environment, time is of the essence," Feld wrote. "We believe the company is well-positioned to execute in the near term; however, should this prove more challenging, we also believe Riot could be an exciting candidate for consolidation, and we would expect there to be significant interest in the company and its premier power assets."

data.title: Jones Lang LaSalle Non-GAAP EPS of $8.71 beats by $1.35, revenue of $7.61B beats by $170M
data.description:
• Jones Lang LaSalle press release (JLL): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $8.71 beats by $1.35.
  • Revenue of $7.61B (+11.7% Y/Y) beats by $170M.
  • Cash provided by operating activities was a record $1.2 billion for the year; Free Cash Flow6 was nearly $1.0 billion
  • Share repurchases were $80.3 million this quarter, bringing full-year repurchases to $211.5 million (up 163% versus 2024)

data.title: Earnings Snapshot: Analog Devices tops FQ1 estimates; sees FQ2 outlook above forecast
Humain unveils $3B investment in xAI ahead of SpaceX merger
data.description:
Humain, the Saudi artificial intelligence company, announced on Wednesday that it has invested $3B into Elon Musk's xAI (X.AI) ahead of its pending merger with SpaceX (SPACE).

The $3B investment is a part of xAI's Series E funding round, which was announced last month. At the time, xAI did not mention Humain was a part of the funding round, but mentioned that Nvidia (NVDA) and Cisco (CSCO) were among the strategic investors.

“This investment reflects HUMAIN’s conviction in transformational AI and our ability to deploy meaningful capital behind exceptional opportunities where long-term vision, technical excellence, and execution converge,xAI’s trajectory, further strengthened by its acquisition by SpaceX, one of the largest technology mergers on record, represents the kind of high-impact platform we seek to support with significant capital,” Tareq Amin, CEO of HUMAIN, said in a statement.

Humain has struck AI-related partnerships with AMD (AMD), among others, in recent memory.

SpaceX, which is also controlled by Musk, announced earlier this month that it would be acquiring xAI. “SpaceX has acquired xAI to form the most ambitious, vertically-integrated innovation engine on (and off) Earth, with AI, rockets, space-based internet, direct-to-mobile device communications and the world’s foremost real-time information and free speech platform,” Musk wrote in a statement on SpaceX's website at the time.

The combined company will have a valuation of $1.25T, according to an internal memo.

SpaceX is reportedly preparing for an initial public offering later this year.

data.title: Moody's Non-GAAP EPS of $3.64 beats by $0.20, revenue of $1.89B beats by $20M
data.description:
• Moody's press release (MCO): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $3.64 beats by $0.20.
  • Revenue of $1.89B (+13.2% Y/Y) beats by $20M.
  • Revenue grew 9%, or 6% on an organic constant currency basis, versus the prior-year period, including 12% growth in Decision Solutions, 6% in Research and Insights and 8% in Data & Information, each on a reported basis.

data.title: Cencora’s animal health unit to merge with Covetrus in $3.5B transaction
data.description:
• Drug distributor Cencora (COR) and Covetrus have entered into a definitive agreement under which Covetrus and MWI Animal Health (MWI) will merge, creating a combined company offering a comprehensive animal health platform.
  • The transaction values MWI at an enterprise value of $3.5 billion, which exceeds Cencora’s (COR) current carrying value (book value) of the business, according to a statement on Wednesday.
  • Upon closing, Cencora will receive upfront cash proceeds of $1.25 billion, $800 million in preferred equity, and $1.45 billion paid in common equity in the combined company, resulting in a non-controlling 34.3% common equity stake in the combined company.
  • Cencora reaffirmed fiscal 2026 financial guidance.

data.title: Mister Car Wash to go private after taking buyout deal
data.description:
Mister Car Wash (MCW) announced on Wednesday that it struck a deal with Leonard Green & Partners to be taken private. The company said Leonard Green will purchase all the outstanding shares of the company’s common stock that are not already owned by affiliates for $7.00 per share. The deal has an implied enterprise value of $3.1 billion. 

"Taking our company private will help us accelerate our growth by investing more boldly in our stores, our people, and our technologies to capture the multiple opportunities ahead. Most importantly, it brings us closer to fulfilling our vision of tripling our footprint while staying true to the values and mission that got us here," stated Mister Car Wash (MCW) CEO John Lai.

The transaction was unanimously approved and recommended by a special committee of Mister Car Wash's (MCW) board. The deal is expected to close in the first half of 2026, subject to obtaining regulatory approvals and the satisfaction or waiver of other customary closing conditions.

Mister Car Wash (MCW) traces its roots to a single car wash opened in Houston, Texas, in 1969. In 1996, Car Wash Partners, Inc. was formed to roll up independent washes into a national brand, acquiring the original 11-store Mister Car Wash chain in 1998 and relocating headquarters to Tucson, Arizona. Through the 2000s and 2010s, the company expanded aggressively via acquisitions and greenfield builds, backed by private equity owners ONCAP and later Leonard Green & Partners. Rebranded as Mister Car Wash, the company went public on June 25, 2021.

Shares of Mister Car Wash (MCW) jumped 15.5% in premarket trading on Wednesday to $6.95.

data.title: Upwork stock jumps on $300M stock buyback plan
data.description:
• Upwork (UPWK) board of directors approved a new $300M share repurchase program.
  • This additional authorization follows the company’s 2025 deployment of $136M in cash to repurchase more than 9M shares.
  • UPWK shares rose +8.7% premarket at $13.87.

data.title: Perion Network Non-GAAP EPS of $0.49 misses by $0.02, revenue of $137.1M beats by $0.57M
data.description:
• Perion Network press release (PERI): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.49 misses by $0.02.
  • Revenue of $137.1M (+5.8% Y/Y) beats by $0.57M.
  • Contribution ex-TAC grew 19% YoY to $65.2 million, significantly outpacing revenue growth
  • Traffic Acquisition Costs and Media Buy (“TAC”): TAC amounted to $71.9 million, or 52% of revenue, in the fourth quarter of 2025, compared with $74.8 million, or 58% of revenue, in the fourth quarter of 2024.

  • Full Year 2026 Guidance reflects planned acceleration of Perion One adoption and increased investment in innovation and go-to-market.

    • Contribution ex-TAC: $215 million to $235 million
    • Adjusted EBITDA: $50 million to $54 million
  • Shares +1% PM.

data.title: Essential Properties Realty Trust prices upsized stock offering
data.description:
Essential Properties Realty Trust (EPRT) has priced an upsized public offering of about 10.87M shares at $32.20 per share, all to be sold under forward sale agreements.

The offering was increased from the previously announced 9.5M shares and is expected to close on February 19, 2026, subject to customary conditions.

BofA Securities, Mizuho, Truist Securities, and Wells Fargo Securities are acting as the joint book-running managers for the offering.

The underwriters have been granted a 30-day option, exercisable in whole or in part from time to time, to purchase up to an additional 1.63M shares of the company’s common stock.

The company will not receive any proceeds from the sale of shares of its common stock by the forward purchasers (or affiliates thereof). It intends to contribute any net proceeds from the settlement of the forward sale agreements to the company’s operating partnership in exchange for OP Units, and the operating partnership intends to use such net proceeds for general corporate purposes, including potential future investments.
